ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "body" TEXT /* Content body of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author who wrote the article */,
  "slug" TEXT /* URL-friendly slug for the article */,
  "image" TEXT /* File name of the article's associated image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image for accessibility */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was published */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the article (e.g., Draft, Published, Archived) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the article (e.g., Original, Guest Post) */,
  "meta_description" TEXT /* Meta description for SEO */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the article */,
  "featured_image" TEXT /* File name of the featured image */,
  "thumbnail_image" TEXT /* File name of the thumbnail image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* File name of the author's profile image */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the author's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author account was last updated */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the tag (e.g., Seasonal, Dietary, Theme) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_body" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was created */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., Approved, Pending, Rejected) */,
  "reported" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment has been reported */,
  "reported_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., author, editor, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* File name of the user's profile image */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Rating value (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the article has received */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the article has received */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares the article has received */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the article */,
  "ratings_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings on the article */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the article */,
  "social_shares" INTEGER /* Number of social media shares */,
  "email_shares" INTEGER /* Number of email shares */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follows" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author being followed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the follow was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., New Article, Comment, Rating) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "related_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main article */,
  "related_article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "related_article_id")
)
